category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a C-language implementation of Javascript Object Signing and Encryption; official repository README lists JOSE standards implemented.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is "Welcome to José!".
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface with supported algorithms, command examples, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/latchset/jose; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists JWS, JWE, JWK, JWA, JWT, and command-line examples.
